unresolved_gap: Credentialed DRGR portal — operator must export and drop manifests in manual_drop_dir.

PRASA aqueduct/sewer authority. ingest_prasa.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers exported procurement files to data/raw/PRASA/. Includes Consulting Engineer Report FY2024 baseline. NOTE expected output prasa_contracts_master.csv is declared but has no producer or consumer yet (the producer writes only pr_prasa_contracts.csv, which build_financial_flows_master.py consumes); the master aggregation is a future deliverable, not a current gap.

PR Comptroller (OCPR) audit reports and findings on government entities and contractors. Operator delivers exported CSV/Excel to the dropzone. NOTE the OCPR contract registry (consultacontratos.ocpr.gov.pr) is a separate product still needing a dedicated scraper.
PR Central Office for Recovery, Reconstruction and Resiliency project tracker.
FSRS prime-to-sub reporting. Joins with USAspending subaward stream.
SAM full extract + per-UEI enrichment for parent resolution. Supplemented by scripts/usaspending_parent_uei_extract.py (no rate limit). SAM API rate: 1,000 req/day → full 2,334-UEI run = 2.3+ days.

PR Office of Government Ethics (OEG) state-level lobbyist (cabildero) registry. ingest_cabilderos.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers the OEG export to data/raw/Cabilderos/. Cross-references cabildero clients with federal award recipients to surface dual-influence entities.

PR State Election Commission (CEE/CEEPUR) state-level donation registry. ingest_donaciones.py is a dropzone reader for operator-delivered CEE CSV exports — no network code. Previously mislabeled as using ingest_fec.py (federal FEC) with a wrong output path. Cross-references federal FEC via analyze_political_crossref.py.
